inputs.user_input: Draft and send an email to all students reminding them that the Software Testing quiz covering Unit Testing and Black Box Testing is next Monday at 9am. Include what topics to study and how to prepare.

output:
✗ Email rejected by instructor. Not sent.

Draft was:
SUBJECT: Software Testing Quiz Reminder: Unit Testing & Black Box Testing

BODY:
Dear Students,

This email serves as a reminder regarding our upcoming quiz for the Software Testing course.

The quiz is scheduled for **next Monday at 9:00 AM**.

It will cover the following key topics:
*   **Unit Testing:** Principles, methodologies, and best practices for testing individual components or units of software.
*   **Black Box Testing:** As discussed, this type of software testing focuses primarily on the input, output, and principle function of a software module, without requiring knowledge of its internal structure. We will cover various techniques and approaches related to black box testing.

To prepare effectively for the quiz, please ensure you thoroughly review all lecture materials, assigned readings, and any practical exercises related to Unit Testing and Black Box Testing. A comprehensive understanding of the concepts and their application will be essential.

Should you have any urgent questions regarding the quiz topics, please do not hesitate to reach out during office hours or via email before the quiz date.

Sincerely,

[Lecturer's Name]
[Lecturer's Title]
Mae Fah Luang University
